rawText: Commercial office building at 123 Main St, Austin TX 78701. 12-story steel frame, fire-resistive construction. Built 2016. Total insured value: $8,500,000. Fully sprinklered NFPA-13 system. Central station monitoring. New roof installed 2021. Professional services occupancy (law firm). No manufacturing or hazardous materials on site.
notes: Clean modern office: low construction risk, excellent protection, low occupancy hazard
